title: Web Development
tagline: Fast, accessible web apps with modern frameworks and pixel-perfect UX.
overviewHeading: Web experiences that convert and scale
overview: We build marketing sites, SaaS dashboards, and e-commerce platforms with Next.js, React, and performance-first engineering.

benefits.title: Faster delivery
benefits.description: Ship validated features in iterative sprints with clear milestones.

benefits.title: Production quality
benefits.description: Architecture, testing, and observability built in from day one.

benefits.title: Scalable foundation
benefits.description: Systems designed to grow from MVP to enterprise scale.

features.title: Performance & SEO
features.description: Server rendering, image optimization, and Core Web Vitals tuning out of the box.

features.title: Design system integration
features.description: Pixel-perfect implementation of your brand with reusable component libraries.

faq.question: How long does a typical engagement take?
faq.answer: Most projects run 8–16 weeks depending on scope. We provide a timeline estimate after discovery.

faq.question: Do you work with existing teams?
faq.answer: Yes. We embed alongside your engineers and product managers using your tools and rituals.

faq.question: What does onboarding look like?
faq.answer: We start with a discovery workshop, align on goals, then move into a two-week pilot sprint.
